label: Order Summary
description: Six KPIs showing total, open, partially filled, filled, rejected, and failed order counts.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets in widget-wrapper.tsx line 89

0.4.note: no any or @ts-ignore in widget file

0.5.note: widget imports only from context and shared components; no lib/mocks imports

0.6.note: isLoading guard renders "—" for all metric values

0.7.note: KPI strip shows zeros when no orders — valid state for a summary strip

0.8.note: error guard: renders rose error message when context.error is set

0.9.note: no commented-out blocks or unreachable branches

l0.notes: Fixed 0.8 in prior session: added error early-return before metrics array.

1.1.note: reads summary and isLoading exclusively via useOrdersData()

1.2.note: orders-data-context.tsx line 145: useGlobalScope(); scopeStrategyIds derived from globalScope

1.3.note: scopedOrders filters by scopeStrategyIds (org→client→strategy cascade) in context

1.4.note: getStrategyIdsForScope accepts clientIds; cascades through org→client→strategy

1.5.note: strategyFilter state + scopeStrategyIds chain covers strategy-level scoping

1.6.note: scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 skips filter, returns all orders (context line 253-255)

1.7.note: widget has no inline reference data; context lib/mocks imports are dev-mode paths in context layer, not in widget

l1.notes: Context (read-only): lib/mocks imports are acceptable mock-data paths for dev mode in the data context layer.

l2.notes: Globally satisfied by commits 32ba8ab ({domain,tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests). Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (live order counts), paper ✓ (shows SIMULATED orders), batch ✓ (shows only FILLED orders). Widget displays summary derived from scopedOrders which is mode-filtered.

3.2.note: orders-data-context.tsx line 146: const { isPaper, isBatch } = useExecutionMode(); scopedOrders memo applies both flags at lines 259-270.

3.3.note: KPI strip is display-only; no order entry. Human check not applicable.

3.4.note: Human should confirm batch mode indicator is visible in layout when isBatch=true.

3.5.note: Paper mode behavior defined: orders tagged with '(Paper)' suffix and status set to SIMULATED. Widget will display simulated count as 'open'.

3.6.note: KPI strip has no WebSocket or interval polling; data sourced from shared context.

l3.notes: Agent-executable checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 complete. Human must verify 3.4 (batch mode visual indicator in layout).

4.1.note: No interactive elements; widget is purely display. No onClick handlers.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks inside render. requiredEntitlements declared only in register.ts; gate handled by WidgetWrapper.

4.8.note: Human should verify no overflow at minH=1.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 complete. Human to verify 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 (mostly N/A for this display widget).

5.1.note: Target strategies: cross-domain — serves all strategy types as it summarises order counts regardless of strategy. Relevant to: basis-trade, recursive-staked-basis, AMM-LP, lending-arb, liquidation-monitor, and all CeFi/TradFi/Sports strategies. Widget is strategy-agnostic display.

l5.notes: 5.2-5.6 require human walkthrough. Widget is display-only; execution flow N/A.

l6.notes: Deferred — L6 test authoring not in scope for this pass.

7.1.note: Zero hex/rgb/hsl literals in widget file.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

7.3.note: 40 lines — well within 500-line limit. Single component function < 200 lines.

7.4.note: OrdersKpiStripWidget PascalCase, file kebab-case, no hooks defined in widget.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML= in widget file.

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget file; no inline object/array literals in dependency arrays.

l7.notes: All checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred until i18n ships.

8.1.note: Zero text-[...] or fontSize occurrences in widget file.

8.2.note: Zero arbitrary spacing (p-[...], m-[...], gap-[...]) in widget file.

8.3.note: Uses KpiSummaryWidget shared primitive. No bare div+tailwind constructs.

8.4.note:
Agent: no without alt, no bare , no
. Human: keyboard-only + screen-reader pass needed.

8.5.note: Human: verify renders correctly at minW=1/minH=1 without horizontal overflow.

l8.notes: Agent-executable 8.1-8.3 fully pass. Human to complete 8.4 a11y walkthrough and 8.5 resize test.

keepSeparate.rationale: KPI strip and orders table are separate widget instances placed in the same preset layout. Strip summarises; table details. Different minH/defaultH makes merging impractical.

relationships.notes: Peer of orders-table: both consume OrdersDataProvider but neither drives the other. KPI strip reflects the same filteredOrders as the table.

dataContract.notes: Data sourced from shared OrdersDataProvider which calls useOrders() hook (REST). Ledger changes trigger refetch via mock-order-filled / mock-ledger-reset window events. Production: REST polling via /api/orders with WebSocket upgrade path.

gaps: Paper mode visual indicator not confirmed by human
Batch mode visual indicator not confirmed by human
coverage.notes: Widget is strategy-agnostic — summarises all order statuses regardless of asset class. Coverage is inherently complete for any order emitted by the system.

findings.description: orders-kpi-strip-widget.tsx — widget was not reading error from useOrdersData(). Fixed in prior session.
findings.fix: Added error early-return rendering rose error message before metrics array

findings.description: orders-kpi-strip-widget.tsx — 13 user-visible strings (labels, error text) not wrapped in i18n calls
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
